beats.concept: The Budget Furnace: one overpriced "$$$ PREMIUM MODEL" core devours every incoming request. A torrent of glowing request-token particles rains from the top and
techniques: deterministic particle-system torrent (46 index-seeded request tokens looping top->core with funnel-convergence pull via pow-eased lerp)
convergence funnel cone (SVG converging guide-lines + flowing dashed center spine via animated strokeDashoffset)
devouring core with impact-cadence pulse, animated spark ring, expanding shockwave per feed impact, and inner aperture flash
physics-ish parabolic coin ejecta (sin-arc flight, flip rotation via scaleX, opacity life-cycle) launched per consumed request
liquid-fill draining tank (clipPath-masked multi-wave SVG surface paths + bright surface line + level ticks + draining drip droplets) that empties as the model feeds
fast-rising mono COST odometer counter with deterministic thousands formatting, red recolor + scale-kick synced to spoken words
narration word-sync gating (spoke('draining')/'budget') drives drain spikes, red recolor, OVERPAYING flip, and danger wash
ambient overpay backdrop (blurred radial glow + floating dollar embers, no opaque background paint)
solid dark backings (rgba(8,6,18,0.72)) under translucent liquid/highlights for high-contrast legibility

beats.concept: Difficulty-based ROUTING shown as a particle pipeline in isometric perspective. Request-token chips rain down onto a central rotating ROUTER/diamond gate; the g
techniques: isometric/3D-perspective diverging lanes (skewed trapezoid floors + perspective depth-rungs + receding scale)
deterministic particle system (26 sin-hash seeded request chips on a looping fall->inspect->route lifecycle)
physics-ish parabolic routing flings with comet trails along each lane spine
router diamond gate with counter-rotating inner diamond + live difficulty-meter sweep + three lit directional exit ports
per-chip difficulty meter that determines lane assignment for an ~80/~/20 split
liquid catch-basin fill (rising fillOpacity volume + wobbling quadratic surface highlight)
word-synced throughput snap (volumes climb then ease to 80% on 'eighty' and 20% on 'twenty', with snap-flash scale + LOCKED pills; MID is the honest remainder to 100)
dashed traffic-flow pulse lines + animated strokeDashoffset along lane spines and intake stream
side-rail draw-on via strokeDashoffset reveal synced to lane build-out
staged spring choreography (title -> lanes draw outward -> gate snaps -> stream begins -> tallies resolve)

beats.concept: A BEFORE vs AFTER monthly-cost comparison on a keynote pedestal. Two liquid-filled "bill" bars stand side by side: the BEFORE bar fills tall to $1000; on "Sixty
techniques: liquid-fill columns with wobbling meniscus (SVG path Q-curves + highlight stroke)
bar-race liquid drain: AFTER column collapses 100%->40% height on the spoken word 'sixty'
physics slam with spring overshoot + tilt-settle for the -60% hero slab
impact shockwave: dual concentric expanding rings with thinning stroke, radius-clamped in-frame
decaying screen-shake via exp() envelope on a shared transform group
deterministic currency particle-system (rising $ coins off BEFORE + draining droplets off AFTER, index-seeded sin-hash loops)
held-value QUALITY pill pinned at 100 with twin === quality marks + dash-offset checkmark draw
perspective floor grid with converging verticals + soft blurred floor-glow puddles
savings delta bracket with end-caps connecting the two column tops + ghost drained-zone fill + 40% gridline
gradient-clipped hero typography (WebkitBackgroundClip text) with layered drop-shadow glow
vertical wipe-in center divider with a glowing lead dot
word-synced staging: fill -> quality-pin -> drain+slam+shockwave -> resolve caption
